div1.entryFree:
Crab, 1) crawfish: Hml. II, 2, 206.
2) wild apple: Tp. II, 2, 171. LLL IV, 2, 6. V, 2, 935. Mids. II, 1, 48. you must not look so sour. It is my fashion, when I see a c. Shr. II, 230. she's as like this as a c. is like an apple; . . . she will taste as like this as a c. does to a c. Lr. I, 5, 16. 18 (the crab being the emblem of a morose person; cf. Crabbed).
3) name of a dog: Gentl. II, 3, 5. Gentl. II, 3, 5 IV, 4, 26.
